---
title: "finalproject"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-29"
---
```{r}
library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("selfesteem_data.xlsx")
install.packages(c("psych", "lavaan", "semTools"))
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(psych)
library(lavaan)
library(semTools)

```
```{r}
#creating summary df to show the distribution of each variable and question in a long table 
summary_long <- df %>%
  summarise(across(
    everything(),
    list(mean = ~mean(. , na.rm = TRUE),
         median = ~median(. , na.rm = TRUE))
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_sep = "_"
  )

summary_long
```
```{r}
#calculating average response to depressive symptom survey questions (0-3)
total_sum_DS <- sum(df %>% select(starts_with("DS")) %>% unlist() %>% as.numeric(), na.rm = TRUE)

# Number of non-missing values
total_n_DS <- sum(!is.na(df %>% select(starts_with("DS")) %>% unlist()))

# Manual mean
mean_DS <- total_sum_DS / total_n_DS

mean_DS

```
```{r}
#calculating average response to self-esteem symptom survey questions (1-4)
total_sum_SE <- sum(df %>% select(starts_with("SE")) %>% unlist() %>% as.numeric(), na.rm = TRUE)

# Number of non-missing values
total_n_SE <- sum(!is.na(df %>% select(starts_with("SE")) %>% unlist()))

# Manual mean
mean_SE <- total_sum_SE / total_n_SE

mean_SE
```
```{r}
#calculating average response to hope symptom survey questions (1-6)
total_sum_H <- sum(df %>% select(starts_with("H")) %>% unlist() %>% as.numeric(), na.rm = TRUE)

# Number of non-missing values
total_n_H <- sum(!is.na(df %>% select(starts_with("H")) %>% unlist()))

# Manual mean
mean_H <- total_sum_H / total_n_H

mean_H
```
```{r}
#mutate "Age" column so it's not included in the anxiety calculations (also starts with "A")

df <- df %>%
  rename(age = Age)

#calculating average response to anxiety symptom survey questions (1-4)
total_sum_A <- sum(df %>% select(starts_with("A")) %>% unlist() %>% as.numeric(), na.rm = TRUE)

# Number of non-missing values
total_n_A <- sum(!is.na(df %>% select(starts_with("A")) %>% unlist()))

# Manual mean
mean_A <- total_sum_A / total_n_A

mean_A
```
```{r}
#visualize z-scores for each scale to analyze responses across the df 

library(ggplot2)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    SE_total = rowMeans(select(., all_of(esteem_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    DS_total = rowMeans(select(., all_of(depressive_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    H_total  = rowMeans(select(., all_of(hope_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    A_total  = rowMeans(select(., all_of(anxiety_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    SE_z = as.numeric(scale(SE_total)),
    DS_z = as.numeric(scale(DS_total)),
    H_z  = as.numeric(scale(H_total)),
    A_z  = as.numeric(scale(A_total))
  )
df %>%
  select(SE_z, DS_z, H_z, A_z) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "scale", values_to = "z") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = scale, y = z)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Z-Standardized Total Variable Scores",
       x = "Variable",
       y = "Z-Score")
```
```{r}
#creating items for correlation matrix
```

```{r}


# ---------------------------------------
# 1. Define item groups
# ---------------------------------------

selfesteem_items  <- paste0("SE", 1:10)
depression_items  <- paste0("DS", 1:20)
anxiety_items     <- paste0("A", 1:10)
hope_items        <- paste0("H", 1:6)

# ---------------------------------------
# 2. Convert items to numeric (very important)
# ---------------------------------------

df[selfesteem_items]  <- lapply(df[selfesteem_items],  function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
df[depression_items]  <- lapply(df[depression_items],  function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
df[anxiety_items]     <- lapply(df[anxiety_items],     function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
df[hope_items]        <- lapply(df[hope_items],        function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))

# ---------------------------------------
# 3. Compute composite scores (row means)
# ---------------------------------------

df$SelfEsteem       <- rowSums(df[selfesteem_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$DepressiveSympt  <- rowSums(df[depression_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$Anxiety          <- rowSums(df[anxiety_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$Hope             <- rowSums(df[hope_items], na.rm = TRUE)

# ---------------------------------------
# 4. Compute Cronbach's alphas
# ---------------------------------------

alpha_selfesteem <- psych::alpha(df[selfesteem_items])$total$raw_alpha
alpha_dep        <- psych::alpha(df[depression_items])$total$raw_alpha
alpha_anxiety    <- psych::alpha(df[anxiety_items])$total$raw_alpha
alpha_hope       <- psych::alpha(df[hope_items])$total$raw_alpha

alphas <- c(
 NA,        # Gender
  NA,        # Age
  alpha_selfesteem,
  alpha_hope,
  alpha_anxiety,
  alpha_dep
)

# ---------------------------------------
# 5. Correlation matrix
# ---------------------------------------

vars <- c("Gender", "age", "SelfEsteem", "Hope", "Anxiety", "DepressiveSympt")

cors <- corr.test(df[vars])
rmat <- cors$r
pmat <- cors$p

# ---------------------------------------
# 6. Add significance stars
# ---------------------------------------

stars <- ifelse(pmat < .001, "***",
         ifelse(pmat < .01, "**",
         ifelse(pmat < .05, "*", "")))

rstar <- rmat

for(i in 1:nrow(rstar)){
  for(j in 1:ncol(rstar)){
    if(j < i){
      rstar[i,j] <- paste0(round(rmat[i,j], 2), stars[i,j])
    } else {
      rstar[i,j] <- ""
    }
  }
}

# Place alphas on diagonal
diag(rstar) <- round(alphas, 2)

# ---------------------------------------
# 7. Means and SDs
# ---------------------------------------

M  <- sapply(df[vars], mean, na.rm = TRUE)
SD <- sapply(df[vars], sd, na.rm = TRUE)



rstar
 M
SD
```


```{r}
library(lavaan)
# SUM SCORES instead of means
df$SelfEsteem_sum <- rowSums(df[, esteem_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$Hope_sum       <- rowSums(df[, hope_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$Anxiety_sum    <- rowSums(df[, anxiety_items], na.rm = TRUE)
df$Depress_sum    <- rowSums(df[, depressive_items], na.rm = TRUE)

df_f <- df[df$Gender == 0, ]



model_sum <- '

  # Mediation paths
  Hope_sum       ~ a1*SelfEsteem_sum
  Anxiety_sum    ~ a2*SelfEsteem_sum
  Depress_sum    ~ b1*Hope_sum + b2*Anxiety_sum + c*SelfEsteem_sum

  # Indirect effects
  indirect_Hope    := a1 * b1
  indirect_Anxiety := a2 * b2
  total_indirect   := indirect_Hope + indirect_Anxiety

  # Total effect
  total := c + total_indirect
'


# Fit the model on female participants only
fit_female <- sem(model_sum, data = df_f)

# Summary with standardized estimates
summary(fit_female, standardized = TRUE, fit.measures = TRUE)


fit_sum <- sem(
  model_sum,
  data = df_f,
  se = "bootstrap",
  bootstrap = 5000
)
```
```{r}
# Extract R-squared values for all endogenous variables
lavInspect(fit_female, "r2")
summary(
  fit_sum,
  standardized = TRUE,
  rsquare = TRUE,
  fit.measures = TRUE
)
```
```{r}
f_se_dep <- lm(Depress_sum ~ SelfEsteem_sum, data = df_f)
summary(f_se_dep)
```
```{r}
ggplot(df_f, aes(x = SelfEsteem_sum, y = Depress_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Self-Esteem and Depressive Symptoms in Females",
    x = "Self-Esteem",
    y = "Depressive Symptoms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ggplot(df_m, aes(x = Hope_sum, y = Depress_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Hope and Depressive Symptoms in Males",
    x = "Hope",
    y = "Depressive Symptoms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ggplot(df_f, aes(x = Hope_sum, y = Depress_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Hope and Depressive Symptoms in Female Adolescents",
    x = "Hope",
    y = "Depressive Symptoms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
df_m <- df[df$Gender == 1, ]
m_hope_dep <- lm(Depress_sum ~ Hope_sum, data = df_m)
summary(m_hope_dep)

```
```{r}
ggplot(df_m, aes(x = Hope_sum, y = Depress_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Hope and Depressive Symptoms in Males",
    x = "Hope",
    y = "Depressive Symptoms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
m_hope_anx <- lm(Anxiety_sum ~ Hope_sum, data = df_m)
summary(m_hope_anx)
```
```{r}
ggplot(df_f, aes(x = Hope_sum, y = Anxiety_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Hope and Anxiety in Males",
    x = "Hope",
    y = "Anxiety"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
f_se_anx <- lm(Anxiety_sum ~ SelfEsteem_sum, data = df_f)
summary(f_se_anx)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_f, aes(x = SelfEsteem_sum, y = Anxiety_sum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Self Esteem and Anxiety in Females",
    x = "Self Esteem",
    y = "Anxiety"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
testmodel <- lm(Depress_sum ~ SelfEsteem_sum + Anxiety_sum + Hope_sum, data = df)
summary(testmodel)
```
```{r}
library(car)
vif(testmodel)

```
```{r}
testmodelf <- lm(Depress_sum ~ SelfEsteem_sum + Anxiety_sum + Hope_sum, data = df_f)
summary(testmodelf)
```
```{r}
vif(testmodelf)

```
```{r}
testmodelm <- lm(Depress_sum ~ SelfEsteem_sum + Anxiety_sum + Hope_sum, data = df_m)
summary(testmodelm)
```
```{r}
vif(testmodelm)

```
